response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (15% below threshold) combined with our critical network stress, my marginal 44% SoC, and lack of established trust circles makes sharing infeasible; prioritizing own survival margin and grid reconnection monitoring.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
